name: Spicy Fried Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. HEAT A WOK OR LARGE DEEP PAN until it is hot.
2. ADD the oil.
3. WHEN THE OIL BEGINS TO SMOKE LIGHTLY, deep-fry the cashew nuts for 2 minutes or until they begin to turn lightly brown.
4. WHILE THE CASHEW NUTS ARE BROWNING, START ANOTHER FRYING PAN and HEAT IT.
5. REMOVE THE NUTS FROM THE OIL WITH A SLANTED SPOON and ADD THEM DIRECTLY TO THE HEATING PAN.
6. HINT: TAKE THE CASHEW NUTS OUT OF THE OIL WHEN THEY ARE LIGHTLY BROWNED AS THEY CONTINUE COOKING EVEN AFTER BEING TAKEN OUT OF THE OIL. SAVE THE OIL IN WHICH THE NUTS HAVE BEEN COOKED, AS IT CAN BE USED AGAIN.
7. ADD the salt, pepper, chili powder, and five spice powder.
8. STIR-FRY FOR 2 MINUTES OR UNTIL THE CASHEW NUTS ARE WELL COVERED WITH THE SPICE.
9. ALLOW TO COOL AND SERVE WITH DRINKS.
